scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-test-session && npm run build --workspace @vrtmrz/ui-interactions && npm run build --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-plugin-kit
scripts.build:workspace: npm run build && npm run build:octagonal-wheels
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-test-session && npm run build --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-test-session && npm run check --workspace @vrtmrz/ui-interactions && npm run build --workspace @vrtmrz/ui-interactions && npm run check --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-plugin-kit
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:harness && npm run check:e2e
scripts.check:workspace: npm run check:all && npm run check:octagonal-wheels && npm run check:release-tools
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-test-session && npm run test --workspace @vrtmrz/obsidian-plugin-kit && npm run test --workspace @vrtmrz/ui-interactions
scripts.test:octagonal-wheels: npm test --workspace octagonal-wheels -- --reporter=dot && npm run test:node --workspace octagonal-wheels
scripts.test:workspace: npm test && npm run test:harness && npm run test:octagonal-wheels
scripts.release:prepare:harness: npm run check:harness && npm run build:harness && node scripts/prepare-harness-release.mjs
scripts.verify:workspace: npm run check:workspace && npm run test:workspace && npm run build:workspace && npm run build:harness && npm run pack:workspace && npm run verify:packed-consumer
